name: 正義長輩（已故祖父）
description: 已故的祖父是唯一真正關心女主的長輩，通過遺囑成為女主逆襲的關鍵助力。雖已去世但影響力貫穿全劇。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: The Fu family fortune belongs solely to Ning Ning. ... The eight scholars we sponsored are orphans of comrades who fought alongside me. Their fiances we've cultivated for Ning Ning.
examples.context: 已故的祖父是唯一真正關心女主的長輩，通過遺囑成為女主逆襲的關鍵助力。雖已去世但影響力貫穿全劇。
